overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from God of War showing Kratos walking through a vast snowy landscape alongside a massive curved temple structure, then crossing open snow fields toward distant mountain ruins. The environment features heavy snow cover, overcast lighting, and Norse architectural elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy path alongside curved temple structure

agents.ego_description: Kratos walking steadily alongside the curved temple wall with the Leviathan Axe strapped to his back, moving through deep snow

entered.detail: Massive curved stone structure with dark metal trim and hanging icicles forming the right boundary of the path
Towering snow-capped mountains forming the backdrop of the valley
Snow-covered rocky cliffs rising on the left side of the valley

segments.scene_description: Kratos walks along a snowy path bounded by a massive curved temple wall on the right and snow-covered cliffs on the left. The overcast sky diffuses light across the white landscape as he moves steadily forward, the Leviathan Axe visible on his back.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with distant ruins

events.description: moves away from the curved temple structure into open snow field, revealing expansive valley ahead

agents.ego_description: Kratos continues walking across the open snow field toward distant ruins, leaving the temple structure behind

entered.detail: Ancient stone temple ruins visible in the distance ahead, partially buried in snow
Scattered wooden planks and debris partially buried in the snow on the right side

segments.scene_description: Leaving the temple structure behind, Kratos enters a wide-open snow field. The camera reveals an expansive valley with distant ruins ahead and snow-covered peaks now visible to the left. Broken wooden debris appears scattered on the right as he advances toward the ancient structures in the distance.

events.description: approaching the large rocky ruin formations and broken stone structures ahead

agents.ego_description: Kratos walking toward the large rock formations and stone ruins, navigating through deeper snow

entered.detail: Massive broken stone formations and ruins with jagged edges rising from the snow
Ancient stone archway and temple ruins becoming visible between the rock formations

segments.scene_description: Kratos approaches the large rocky ruin formations that dominate the center of the frame. The distant ruins fade from view as he nears the massive stone structures and broken archways ahead. The broken wooden debris on the right moves closer to the foreground as he advances through the deep snow toward the ancient ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow, enclosed snowy corridor into a vast, open valley dominated by ancient ruins. It begins with Kratos walking along a path bounded by a massive curved temple wall and steep cliffs under a diffused, overcast sky. As he leaves the temple structure behind, the scene expands into a wide-open snow field, revealing an expansive valley with distant peaks to the left and scattered wooden debris to the right. The camera then advances further into the deep snow, shifting focus from the distant horizon toward the massive rocky formations and broken archways that loom ahead. Finally, the perspective closes in on these towering stone ruins as the wooden debris moves into the immediate foreground.
